scripts.build:studio: cd studio && npm install && npx sanity build --dir dist && sed -i 's|src="/static/|src="/studio/static/|g; s|href="/static/|href="/studio/static/|g; s|href="/favicon|href="/studio/favicon|g; s|content="/static/|content="/studio/static/|g' dist/index.html
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build && npm run build:studio && mkdir -p dist/studio && cp -r studio/dist/. dist/studio/ && echo 'Studio copied successfully' && ls dist/studio/ | head -5
